requirement_topic.en: EMC / Radio Disturbance of Lighting Equipment (GS standard adopting CISPR 15)
requirement_topic.zh: 照明设备电磁兼容/无线电骚扰（采用 CISPR 15 的 GS 标准）
requirement_topic.zht: 照明設備電磁兼容/無線電騷擾（採用 CISPR 15 的 GS 標準）

summary.en: Ghana does not operate an EU-style standalone EMC Directive. Where electromagnetic compatibility is assessed for lighting equipment, it is through the Ghana Standards Authority （GSA） national standard adopting CISPR 15 （limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment）, as part of GSA conformity assessment for regulated electrical products. CISPR 15 covers conducted disturbances on the mains terminals （150 kHz–30 MHz） and radiated disturbances. Practical EMC scrutiny in Ghana is most relevant for lighting products with electronic drivers and for any wireless / smart functionality, which separately triggers NCA type approval （see ledgh-emc-02）. The product must operate on Ghana's 230 V / 50 Hz mains.
summary.zh: 加纳不设欧盟式独立 EMC 指令。照明设备的电磁兼容性如需评定，通过加纳标准局（GSA）采用 CISPR 15（电气照明及类似设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法）的国家标准进行，作为 GSA 对受管制电气产品合格评定的一部分。CISPR 15 涵盖电源端传导骚扰（150 kHz–30 MHz）及辐射骚扰。在加纳，EMC 审查实务上对配备电子驱动器的照明产品及任何无线/智能功能最为相关，后者另行触发 NCA 型号核准（见 ledgh-emc-02）。产品须在加纳 230 V / 50 Hz 电源上运行。
summary.zht: 迦納不設歐盟式獨立 EMC 指令。照明設備的電磁兼容性如需評定，通過迦納標準局（GSA）採用 CISPR 15（電氣照明及類似設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法）的國家標準進行，作為 GSA 對受管制電氣產品合格評定的一部分。CISPR 15 涵蓋電源端傳導騷擾（150 kHz–30 MHz）及輻射騷擾。在迦納，EMC 審查實務上對配備電子驅動器的照明產品及任何無線/智能功能最為相關，後者另行觸發 NCA 型號核准（見 ledgh-emc-02）。產品須在迦納 230 V / 50 Hz 電源上運行。

standards_or_laws: GS standard adopting CISPR 15 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment
GSA conformity assessment for regulated electrical products (Ghana Standards Authority)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 17743-2017 （limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment）, technically aligned with CISPR 15. For in-scope luminaires sold in China, GB 17743 compliance is part of the CCC scheme （which covers safety and EMC for relevant categories）, tested at CNAS/CMA-accredited laboratories. Both the Ghana GS adoption and China's GB 17743 trace back to CISPR 15, so the underlying emission limits are largely common, but a CCC EMC report is a domestic instrument and is not, by itself, the basis for GSA clearance.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 17743-2017（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。在中国销售的范围内灯具，GB 17743 合规是 CCC 制度（涵盖相关类别的安全和 EMC）的组成部分，由 CNAS/CMA 认可实验室检测。加纳 GS 采用版与中国 GB 17743 同源自 CISPR 15，故基础发射限值基本共通，但 CCC EMC 报告为国内制度，其本身不能作为 GSA 放行的依据。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 17743-2017（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。在中國銷售的範圍內燈具，GB 17743 合規是 CCC 制度（涵蓋相關類別的安全和 EMC）的組成部分，由 CNAS/CMA 認可實驗室檢測。迦納 GS 採用版與中國 GB 17743 同源自 CISPR 15，故基礎發射限值基本共通，但 CCC EMC 報告為國內制度，其本身不能作為 GSA 放行的依據。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743-2017 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (aligned with CISPR 15)

gap.en: Because both the Ghana GS adoption and China's GB 17743 are CISPR 15-derived, the emission limits are largely common and existing CISPR 15 / GB 17743 test data is often technically reusable. The gaps are procedural: （1） Ghana does not have a standalone EMC Directive with its own DoC — EMC, where assessed, sits inside GSA conformity assessment for the product, so the relevant deliverable is a GSA-acceptable conformity-assessment package rather than a separate EMC declaration; （2） GSA generally favours IEC/CISPR / CB-style test evidence from an accredited laboratory over a China-scheme-only CCC report; （3） any wireless / smart-lighting function is regulated separately by the NCA, not by the lighting-EMC standard （see ledgh-emc-02）. Confirm whether EMC evidence is required for the specific product category in the current GSA conformity-assessment scope.
gap.zh: 由于加纳 GS 采用版与中国 GB 17743 同源自 CISPR 15，发射限值基本共通，现有 CISPR 15 / GB 17743 检测数据通常技术上可复用。差距为程序性：（1）加纳无设独立 EMC 指令及其专属 DoC——EMC 如需评定，归入产品的 GSA 合格评定之内，故相关交付物为 GSA 可接受的合格评定文件包，而非独立 EMC 声明；（2）GSA 通常优先接受来自认可实验室的 IEC/CISPR / CB 式检测证据，而非仅与中国制度挂钩的 CCC 报告；（3）任何无线/智能照明功能由 NCA 单独监管，而非由照明 EMC 标准监管（见 ledgh-emc-02）。请确认现行 GSA 合格评定范围是否对具体产品类别要求 EMC 证据。
gap.zht: 由於迦納 GS 採用版與中國 GB 17743 同源自 CISPR 15，發射限值基本共通，現有 CISPR 15 / GB 17743 檢測數據通常技術上可複用。差距為程序性：（1）迦納無設獨立 EMC 指令及其專屬 DoC——EMC 如需評定，歸入產品的 GSA 合格評定之內，故相關交付物為 GSA 可接受的合格評定文件包，而非獨立 EMC 聲明；（2）GSA 通常優先接受來自認可實驗室的 IEC/CISPR / CB 式檢測證據，而非僅與中國制度掛鈎的 CCC 報告；（3）任何無線/智能照明功能由 NCA 單獨監管，而非由照明 EMC 標準監管（見 ledgh-emc-02）。請確認現行 GSA 合格評定範圍是否對具體產品類別要求 EMC 證據。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — EMC, where assessed, is handled within GSA conformity assessment via a GS standard adopting CISPR 15; Ghana has no standalone EMC Directive. Confirm whether EMC evidence is required for the specific product category
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where in CCC scope — GB 17743-2017 compliance is part of CCC certification for in-scope luminaires sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ghana has no standalone EU-style EMC Directive; lighting EMC, where assessed, is handled within GSA conformity assessment through a GS standard adopting CISPR 15. The limits are largely common with China's GB 17743 （both CISPR 15-derived）, so existing emission test data is often technically reusable, but GSA generally favours accredited IEC/CISPR / CB evidence and a Chinese CCC EMC report does not by itself satisfy GSA clearance. Any wireless function is regulated separately by the NCA. Verify whether EMC evidence is required for the specific product category in the current GSA scope.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 加纳无设独立的欧盟式 EMC 指令；照明 EMC 如需评定，归入 GSA 合格评定，通过采用 CISPR 15 的 GS 标准处理。限值与中国 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本共通，故现有发射检测数据通常技术上可复用，但 GSA 通常优先接受认可的 IEC/CISPR / CB 证据，中国 CCC EMC 报告本身不满足 GSA 放行。任何无线功能由 NCA 单独监管。请核验现行 GSA 范围是否对具体产品类别要求 EMC 证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 迦納無設獨立的歐盟式 EMC 指令；照明 EMC 如需評定，歸入 GSA 合格評定，通過採用 CISPR 15 的 GS 標準處理。限值與中國 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本共通，故現有發射檢測數據通常技術上可複用，但 GSA 通常優先接受認可的 IEC/CISPR / CB 證據，中國 CCC EMC 報告本身不滿足 GSA 放行。任何無線功能由 NCA 單獨監管。請核驗現行 GSA 範圍是否對具體產品類別要求 EMC 證據。

requirement_topic.en: Wireless / Smart Lighting — NCA Type Approval (radio equipment)
requirement_topic.zh: 无线/智能照明——NCA 型号核准（无线电设备）
requirement_topic.zht: 無線/智能照明——NCA 型號核准（無線電設備）

summary.en: LED luminaires with integrated wireless functionality （e.g., Wi-Fi / Bluetooth / Zigbee smart lighting, RF remote control） require type approval from Ghana's National Communications Authority （NCA） before importation and sale. The NCA administers type approval of radio / telecommunications equipment to ensure compliant use of the radio spectrum in Ghana. This is in addition to the GSA conformity assessment for the product's electrical safety. The approval covers the radio module's frequency, power, and conformity to recognised radio standards. Purely passive luminaires with no radio transmitter are outside NCA scope; the wireless variant of the same product is in scope.
summary.zh: 集成无线功能的 LED 灯具（如 Wi-Fi / 蓝牙 / Zigbee 智能照明、射频遥控）在进口和销售前须取得加纳国家通信管理局（NCA）的型号核准。NCA 负责无线电/电信设备的型号核准，以确保在加纳合规使用无线电频谱。此项要求是在产品电气安全 GSA 合格评定之外另行适用。核准涵盖无线电模块的频率、功率及对公认无线电标准的符合性。无无线电发射的纯被动灯具不在 NCA 范围内；同一产品的无线版本则在范围内。
summary.zht: 集成無線功能的 LED 燈具（如 Wi-Fi / 藍牙 / Zigbee 智能照明、射頻遙控）在進口和銷售前須取得迦納國家通信管理局（NCA）的型號核准。NCA 負責無線電/電信設備的型號核准，以確保在迦納合規使用無線電頻譜。此項要求是在產品電氣安全 GSA 合格評定之外另行適用。核准涵蓋無線電模組的頻率、功率及對公認無線電標準的符合性。無無線電發射的純被動燈具不在 NCA 範圍內；同一產品的無線版本則在範圍內。

standards_or_laws: NCA type approval of radio / telecommunications equipment (National Communications Authority, Ghana)
Electronic Communications Act, 2008 (Act 775) and NCA type-approval framework

summary.en: In China, wireless-enabled luminaires require SRRC （State Radio Regulation Commission） type approval （型号核准） for the radio module, in addition to any applicable CCC / CQC certification for the lighting product. SRRC approval governs frequency, transmit power, and spurious emissions for use of the radio spectrum in China. SRRC and the Ghana NCA are separate national radio authorities with no mutual recognition — an SRRC certificate does not satisfy the NCA, and vice versa.
summary.zh: 在中国，集成无线功能的灯具除照明产品适用的 CCC / CQC 认证外，无线电模块还须取得 SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准。SRRC 核准管理在中国使用无线电频谱的频率、发射功率及杂散发射。SRRC 与加纳 NCA 为各自独立的国家无线电主管机构，不存在互认——SRRC 证书不满足 NCA，反之亦然。
summary.zht: 在中國，集成無線功能的燈具除照明產品適用的 CCC / CQC 認證外，無線電模組還須取得 SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准。SRRC 核准管理在中國使用無線電頻譜的頻率、發射功率及雜散發射。SRRC 與迦納 NCA 為各自獨立的國家無線電主管機構，不存在互認——SRRC 證書不滿足 NCA，反之亦然。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval (型号核准) — required for wireless-enabled products in China
CCC / CQC certification — for the lighting product itself

gap.en: Both Ghana （NCA） and China （SRRC） require national type approval for the radio module, but they are separate authorities with no mutual recognition: a Chinese SRRC certificate does not satisfy Ghana's NCA, and a fresh NCA type-approval application is required for each wireless luminaire model exported to Ghana. The application typically requires radio test reports （commonly to internationally recognised radio standards） and is filed via the in-country importer / local representative. Key practical points: （1） the radio test evidence China already holds for SRRC may be technically reusable to support the NCA filing, but the NCA process and certificate are separate; （2） NCA approval is in addition to — not a substitute for — GSA conformity assessment of the product's electrical safety; （3） confirm the current NCA type-approval procedure, fees, and accepted test standards before shipment, as a non-approved wireless device can be detained at Tema / Takoradi.
gap.zh: 加纳（NCA）与中国（SRRC）均要求对无线电模块进行国家型号核准，但二者为各自独立、互不承认的主管机构：中国 SRRC 证书不满足加纳 NCA，每一款出口加纳的无线灯具型号均须重新提交 NCA 型号核准申请。申请通常需提交无线电检测报告（一般依据国际公认无线电标准），并经本地进口商/本地代表提交。关键实务要点：（1）中国为 SRRC 已持有的无线电检测证据技术上可复用以支持 NCA 申请，但 NCA 流程及证书为独立的；（2）NCA 核准是在产品电气安全 GSA 合格评定之外另行适用，而非替代；（3）出货前请确认 NCA 现行型号核准程序、费用及可接受检测标准，因未获核准的无线设备可能在特马/塔科拉迪被扣留。
gap.zht: 迦納（NCA）與中國（SRRC）均要求對無線電模組進行國家型號核准，但二者為各自獨立、互不承認的主管機構：中國 SRRC 證書不滿足迦納 NCA，每一款出口迦納的無線燈具型號均須重新提交 NCA 型號核准申請。申請通常需提交無線電檢測報告（一般依據國際公認無線電標準），並經本地進口商/本地代表提交。關鍵實務要點：（1）中國為 SRRC 已持有的無線電檢測證據技術上可複用以支持 NCA 申請，但 NCA 流程及證書為獨立的；（2）NCA 核准是在產品電氣安全 GSA 合格評定之外另行適用，而非替代；（3）出貨前請確認 NCA 現行型號核准程序、費用及可接受檢測標準，因未獲核准的無線設備可能在特馬/塔科拉迪被扣留。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for wireless products — NCA type approval required before import / sale of wireless or smart LED lighting in Ghana; in addition to GSA conformity assessment for electrical safety
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for wireless products — SRRC type approval required for the radio module, in addition to CCC / CQC for the lighting product

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Wireless / smart LED luminaires require NCA type approval in Ghana before import and sale, separate from and in addition to GSA conformity assessment for electrical safety. Ghana's NCA and China's SRRC are independent radio authorities with no mutual recognition, so an SRRC certificate does not satisfy the NCA and a fresh NCA filing （via the in-country importer） is required per wireless model. Radio test evidence may be technically reusable, but the certificate is not. Purely passive luminaires with no transmitter are outside NCA scope. Verify the current NCA procedure before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 无线/智能 LED 灯具在加纳进口和销售前须取得 NCA 型号核准，独立于并附加于电气安全的 GSA 合格评定。加纳 NCA 与中国 SRRC 为各自独立、互不承认的无线电主管机构，故 SRRC 证书不满足 NCA，每一款无线型号均须经本地进口商重新提交 NCA 申请。无线电检测证据技术上可复用，但证书不可复用。无发射的纯被动灯具不在 NCA 范围内。出货前请核验 NCA 现行程序。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 無線/智能 LED 燈具在迦納進口和銷售前須取得 NCA 型號核准，獨立於並附加於電氣安全的 GSA 合格評定。迦納 NCA 與中國 SRRC 為各自獨立、互不承認的無線電主管機構，故 SRRC 證書不滿足 NCA，每一款無線型號均須經本地進口商重新提交 NCA 申請。無線電檢測證據技術上可複用，但證書不可複用。無發射的純被動燈具不在 NCA 範圍內。出貨前請核驗 NCA 現行程序。
